heading: About the Index
body:
The index for this collection specifies the following documents in arrays:

- Documents in the arrays at the `teachers` and `teachers.classes`
  paths are indexed as [embeddedDocuments](bson-data-types-embedded-documents), and the fields inside the
  documents are [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings) indexed.

- Documents in the arrays at the `teachers` path are also indexed as
  the [document](bson-data-types-document) type to support
  [highlights](highlight-ref), and the fields inside the
  documents are dynamically indexed.

- Document in the `clubs` field is indexed as the [document](bson-data-types-document) type with [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings) enabled and the arrays of documents in the
  `clubs.sports` field are indexed as the `embeddedDocuments`
  type with dynamic mappings enabled.
